Worker.title: Worker
Worker.description: A registered worker in the Azilut S.A. payroll system

fullName.description: The full name of the operator

dni.description: The unique D.N.I. number of the operator

puesto.description: The worker's official job description or trade

obra.description: The construction site name where the worker is stationed

pin.description: The 4 to 6 digit numeric login pin

duracion.description: Contract duration or safety induction training length

Signature.title: Signature
Signature.description: Digital card signature confirming acceptance of the 21 mandatory items

certificateCode.description: Unique compliance receipt code generated dynamically

signedAt.description: Dynamic timestamp when the signature was received

workers/{workerId}.description: Workers registered in the online Azilut database

signatures/{signatureId}.description: A list of all worker-signed policies and certifications synced online
